questions.question: Define the fundamental concept of a file in an operating system. Provide its characteristics and explanation.
questions.hint: Describe the structure and features of a file system.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of the file system interface in an operating system?
questions.hint: Focus on the interaction between the operating system and the user.

questions.question: Explain the difference between a file and a directory in a file system. Provide examples to support your explanation.
questions.hint: Use a basic file system hierarchy to illustrate your points.
